name: Anima
description: Shamans who follow the Path of Anima find balance between nature and spirit magic, becoming powerful spellcasters who work with spirits, gaining access to spheres such as Conjuration and Reclamation. (Confirmed: old role-text name 'Channeler' maps to Anima.)

feats.name: Vessel Healing
feats.description: Target one of your summoned Primeval Vessels and draw its energy to heal a target within range for 2d6 + Spellcasting Modifier Vitality (you may split the healing). The Vessel loses 1d4 Vitality after use.

feats.name: Mantle of Elements
feats.description: At Daily Preparation, choose a Mantle.

options.label: Flame
options.description: When missed in melee, retaliate once per round for Spellcasting Modifier Fire damage.

options.label: Frost
options.description: Gain temp Vitality (Tier × 2 + Spellcasting Modifier); deals 2d6 Ice in a touch burst when broken. Restores after a Respite.

options.label: Earth
options.description: Gain charges equal to Spellcasting Modifier to gain Resistance to Physical damage once per Respite.

options.label: Storm
options.description: Disrupt enemy attacks with electric retaliation: 1d4 damage and Strain to attack you until end of their turn.

options.label: Water
options.description: Add 1d6 to all Vitality healing effects.

feats.name: Vessel Strength
feats.description: Target one of your Primeval Vessels to gain an additional damage die for your Primeval Form for 1 minute. The Vessel loses 1d6 Vitality.

feats.name: Primordial Remnants
feats.description: Gain new spirits as options when summoning Primeval Vessels, and you may summon a total of Vessels equal to Tier × 2; they do not fade until the start of a long rest. When summoned, choose its aspect.

feats.name: Spirit Step
feats.description: Teleport instantly next to a Vessel you can see. Gain access to the Conjuration sphere.
